title: DEKTON PRO AUTO Wire Stripper - 2-in-1 Wire Stripping & Cutting Tool | Strips & Cuts Wires Up to 3.2mm Thick & 25mm Length
features: Versatile 2-in-1 Functionality: The DEKTON PRO AUTO WIRE STRIPPER combines both wire stripping and cutting functions in one tool, offering exceptional versatility. Easily strip and cut wires up to 3.2mm thick and 25mm in length, simplifying your electrical work and reducing the need for multiple tools.

Lightweight & User-Friendly Design: Designed for convenience, this wire stripper is lightweight and easy to handle, making it perfect for both professional electricians and DIY enthusiasts. Its ergonomic design ensures comfort during prolonged use, enhancing productivity and reducing hand strain.

Precision Wire Cutting Blade: Equipped with a built-in wire cutting blade, this tool allows for precise and clean cuts, ensuring accurate wire preparations every time. The sharp blade enhances efficiency and helps in achieving professional results with minimal effort.

Effortless One-Handed Operation: The DEKTON PRO AUTO WIRE STRIPPER features a one-handed operation design, allowing users to work more efficiently and with greater ease. This feature is especially useful for tasks that require multitasking or when working in tight spaces.

Durable & Reliable Construction: Built to last, this wire stripper is crafted from high-quality materials that ensure durability and reliability. Its robust construction withstands regular use and provides consistent performance, making it a dependable addition to your toolkit.
description: Introducing the DEKTON PRO AUTO WIRE STRIPPER, a robust and versatile tool designed for both automotive and electrical tasks. This heavy-duty wire stripper features precision cutting blades that ensure clean, accurate cuts and strips every time. Its adjustable stripping length accommodates wires up to 3.2mm in thickness and 25mm in length, allowing for customized precision in various applications. The ergonomic handles are crafted for comfort, reducing hand fatigue during extended use. With its 2-in-1 functionality, this tool combines wire stripping and cutting capabilities into a single device, streamlining your toolkit and enhancing efficiency. Whether you're working on automotive repairs or electrical projects, the DEKTON PRO AUTO WIRE STRIPPER offers reliability and performance, making it an essential addition to any professional's toolkit.
